## Type

- [ ] Rule(s)
- [ ] Template(s)
- [ ] Pack manifest(s)
- [ ] Docs only
- [ ] Scripts / tooling
- [ ] Sample API (`src/` / `tests/`)

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run mstack:verify-packs`
- [ ] `npm run mstack:doctor` (and `MSTACK_PACK=full MSTACK_VERIFY_STRICT=1` if packs changed)
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] README / PACKS updated if rules or templates added
- [ ] [CHANGELOG.md](CHANGELOG.md) under **Unreleased** (or release section)
- [ ] If API changed: [docs/ARCHITECTURE.md](docs/ARCHITECTURE.md) + [docs/DECISIONS.md](docs/DECISIONS.md)
